visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with shoulder-length dark hair, wearing a blue knit bucket hat and a blue fuzzy dress over a white turtleneck, stands in a brightly lit warehouse store (Costco). She holds a large, rectangular advent calendar box featuring an illustration of a festive pink house. She looks directly at the camera with an wide-eyed, enthusiastic expression, pointing at the box. (2) A sharp cut shows a close-up of a white and yellow price tag placard listing 'CATH KIDSTON 24DAYS ADVENT CALENDAR' for '$ 799' with Chinese descriptions. The woman's hand is visible pointing at the price. (3) The woman turns the large box around, revealing the back which is filled with small product graphics and dense ingredient text in English and Chinese. She uses her fingers to trace over the various small hand creams and bottles depicted on the back. (4) The woman holds the box up again, gesturing with her hands while speaking excitedly. Large colorful text overlays appear periodically, emphasizing her points about giving the items as gifts. She maintains high eye contact with the lens. (5) In the final segment, she points at the 'Cath Kidston' logo on the box several times. The background consists of tall industrial shelving and stacks of identical pink gift boxes, creating a sense of high-volume retail environment. She concludes with a bright smile and an open-hand gesture.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 超殺價格. [Variety]: 英國Cath Kid... (2) [Variety]: 聖誕倒數禮盒. (3) [Slogan]: 153372 CATH KIDSTON 24DAYS ADVENT CALENDAR. (4) [Variety]: $ 799. (5) [Variety]: 拆一個新的東西出來. (6) [Variety]: 送給你24位朋友. (7) [Variety]: 拿捏的剛好!!. (8) [Subtitle]: 每天都快樂的聖誕倒數禮盒. [Subtitle]: 裡面的護手霜沐浴乳洗手液. [Subtitle]: 讓你過最夢幻的耶誕節.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female creator as the main presenter throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An Asian woman wearing a blue knit bucket hat with a white logo, a white long-sleeved turtleneck shirt, and a blue textured/fuzzy overall-style dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse, featuring high metal shelving units and massive stacks of merchandise on wooden pallets. Specifically, stacks of pink patterned 'Cath Kidston' advent calendar boxes are prominent.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice begins with high pitch variability and a very excited tone, speaking quickly about a Christmas countdown. Upbeat, major-key electronic festive BGM with a steady four-on-the-floor beat starts immediately. (2) A bright 'ding' sound effect triggers as a price graphic is mentioned. The woman's voice maintains high arousal, emphasizing the value of the product. (3) A brief rustling sound is heard as she handles the large cardboard box. The BGM remains consistent in volume, sitting comfortably below the clear, professional-grade vocal recording. (4) A male voice enters briefly with a playful, exaggerated delivery, mimicking the brand name with a rhythmic contour, creating a humorous stinger effect. (5) The female voice returns to a high-speed list of items found inside the calendar, ending with a positive, rising intonation as the BGM swells slightly for the outro.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Price Display -> Product Details -> Gift Application -> Closing
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the Cath Kidston advent calendar available at Costco by highlighting its attractive pricing and the variety of products it contains, suggesting it as a versatile gift option.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of the product, price, and brand logos while actively encouraging viewers to buy it as a gift.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-energy 'social media creator' style with variety-show captions and sound effects to drive engagement for a seasonal retail product.
